name: Tortilla Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread minced garlic evenly over the round steak and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and lime juice.
2. Place the seasoned steak in the slow cooker.
3. Add the chopped onion, carrots, marjoram, beef broth, and canned tomatoes to the slow cooker.
4. Set the cooker to low heat and cook for 8 hours until the meat is fork tender and can be easily shredded.
5. Fill tortillas with desired fillings and the cooked meat.
